name: r2mcp
description: Use radare2 from Codex through the r2mcp MCP server for reverse engineering, disassembly, and binary analysis.

interface.longDescription: Bundle the r2mcp MCP server and a reverse-engineering skill so Codex can inspect binaries, disassemble code, analyze functions, and drive radare2 workflows from the Codex app or CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use r2mcp to inspect this binary and summarize the entry point
Analyze this executable with radare2 and list suspicious functions
Use r2mcp to explain what this function does
